problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: The key to How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? is Perovskite crystal structure optimization — specifically Perovskite crystal structure — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
